system.docHtml: Sinalë is a tongue of the Elder family. Fluency measures the sophistication of expression in Sinalë, from the halting phrases of a traveler to the nuanced and learned discourse of a native speaker. As with all specific languages, this skill inherits its mechanics from the general [[Language]] skill; see [[Sinale_Language|Sinalë Language]] for the linguistic and cultural background of the tongue itself.
